title: VersionRelatedWork
description: Associated related work to a version

category.description: The category of the related work

issueId.description: The title of the related work

relatedWorkId.description: The id of the related work. For the native release note related work item, this will be null, and Rest API does not support updating it.

title.description: The title of the related work

url.description: The URL of the related work
